race.comment: STRANGLEHOLD (1) was a dominant winner at the Gold Coast last time out and will have taken some confidence from that victory. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the outcome. RITUALIZE (2) is a consistent commodity who has only missed a drum once in six career outings. Has placed three of four around this circuit and gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim. Looms as the main danger. The well-related SOME STYLE (11) (half to G1 winner Peeping) has been plying her trade in harder races in town and should appreciate the drop back in company here. Top-three contender. JAM PACKED (15) is one from one over this course and distance and rarely puts in a poor one. Has to be included. ROYAL GLADIATOR (6) next best with the claim.
